instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs industry-standard modeling languages and architecture description languages such as SysML, AADL, ACME, and MontiArc for representing system components, interfaces, and interconnections across multiple abstraction levels (requirements, functional, logical, and physical).
